skill: One-variable data: Distributions and measures of center and spread
stem:
3, 5, 11, 15, 21

What is the mean of the data shown?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. The mean of a data set is the sum of the values divided by the number of values. The sum is 3 + 5 + 11 + 15 + 21 = 55. There are 5 data values, so the mean is 55 divided by 5 = 11.

Choices A and B are not equal to the mean of this set.

Choice D is incorrect: 15 is a value in the set, not the mean.
